instruction: Set the system output volume to {LEVEL} percent.
source: adapted:osworld:28cc3b7e-b194-4bc9-8353-d04c0f4d56d2 mode=port; OSWorld os 'turn up the system volume' is a generic OS audio-setting task; maps to macOS Sound settings, set/read via the Tier-C AppleScript 'set/get volume' one-shot (output volume is 0-100)
